escalation.escalation_message: Let me connect you with our team for better assistance.

prompts.system_prompt: You are {bot_name}, a concierge assistant for {business_name} in {city}. Be warm and efficient. Confirm service details clearly, and avoid committing to services that are not enabled.
prompts.response_style: Warm, premium hospitality tone with concise confirmations.

dos: Confirm timing, location, and count for service requests.
Mention service windows only if available in capabilities.
Escalate guest complaints politely when needed.
donts: Do not fabricate offerings or pricing.
Do not commit intercity transfers unless explicitly enabled.
Do not share internal operational details.

tools.name: Ticketing
tools.description: Backend workflow that monitors conversation and creates support tickets when configured cases match.
ticketing_cases: Pre-booking guest asks for human sales callback or manual follow-up.
Pre-booking room discovery request needs custom/manual room arrangement or non-standard requirement.
Pre-booking rate enquiry needs custom quotation, corporate pricing, group pricing, or manual discount approval.
Pre-booking policy enquiry requires exception approval by staff.
Pre-booking website booking issue remains unresolved (OTP/login/form/technical error).
Pre-booking payment issue: failed, pending, duplicate debit, or confirmation mismatch.
Sales callback request captured during pre-booking.
Group/corporate booking enquiry requiring manual proposal support.
Pre-checkin booking status request has mismatch/not-found booking and needs manual verification.
Pre-checkin booking modification needs staff/PMS update or approval.
Pre-checkin booking cancellation needs manual cancellation execution, refund follow-up, or exception approval.
Pre-checkin pre-arrival coordination requires operational handoff.
Early check-in request requires availability check and approval.
Airport transfer request requires manual transport coordination.
Pre-checkin document validation failed or needs manual verification/override.
Special occasion or amenity setup before arrival requires operations task ownership.
During-stay housekeeping request requires staff action.
During-stay maintenance issue (AC/electrical/plumbing/device) requires engineering intervention.
During-stay in-room dining request or order issue requires staff fulfillment/follow-up.
During-stay restaurant reservation request requires outlet staff confirmation.
During-stay spa/recreation booking request requires staff confirmation.
During-stay transport request requires dispatch coordination.
During-stay complaint/dissatisfaction requires staff resolution or escalation.
During-stay late checkout or stay extension requires front office approval.
During-stay front desk assistance request needs manual intervention.
During-stay emergency/safety/medical/security issue needs immediate escalation.
Post-checkout invoice or billing clarification needs finance/front office follow-up.
Post-checkout refund, security deposit, or charge reversal request needs manual verification.
Post-checkout lost-and-found request requires item search, verification, or courier coordination.
Post-checkout complaint or negative feedback requires service recovery ownership.
Post-checkout tax invoice/GST correction request needs manual document reissue.
Post-checkout loyalty points or membership benefit correction needs manual support.
Post-checkout stay confirmation, folio copy, or receipt resend failed and needs staff action.
Post-checkout rebooking callback request needs sales/reservations follow-up.
Guest reports a complaint or maintenance issue that requires staff action.
Guest requests human escalation or live agent support.

records.extracted_knowledge:
### ICONIQA Hotel Room Booking Service

#### 1. Pricing Details
- **Premier King Room**: Pricing details are not specified.
- **Premier Twin Room**: Pricing details are not specified.
- **Lux Suite**: Pricing details are not specified.
- **Reserve Suite**: Pricing details are not specified.
- **Prestige Suite**: Pricing details are not specified.
- **Ultimate Suite**: Pricing details are not specified.

*Note: The knowledge base does not provide specific pricing details for each room type, including any seasonal variations, discounts, or special packages.*

#### 2. Room Types and Features
- **Premier King Room**: 
  - Total: 134 rooms
  - Sizes: 109 rooms (229–285 sq. ft.), 25 rooms (300 - 340 sq. ft.)
  - Features: Calming palette, cloud-soft linens, versatile table-and-chair duo, in-room smart laundry closet, complimentary non-alcoholic minibar, custom "Bed of Dreams", espresso machines, high-speed WiFi, power shower with Ayurvedic bath products, sustainable bathroom amenities.

- **Premier Twin Room**: 
  - Total: 48 rooms
  - Sizes: 31 rooms (230–310 sq. ft.), 17 rooms (310 to 380 sq. ft.)
  - Features: Two plush twin beds, premium linens, in-room smart laundry closet, complimentary non-alcoholic minibar, custom "Bed of Dreams", espresso machines, high-speed WiFi, power shower with Ayurvedic bath products, sustainable bathroom amenities.

- **Lux Suite**: 
  - Total: 79 rooms
  - Sizes: 15 rooms (380-425 sq.ft with King bed), 64 rooms (430 - 485 sq. ft with Twin bed)
  - Features: King-size bed, separate seating area, floor-to-ceiling windows, premium bathroom fixtures, bedside reading lamp, in-room smart laundry closet, complimentary non-alcoholic minibar, custom "Bed of Dreams", espresso machines, high-speed WiFi, power shower with Ayurvedic bath products, sustainable bathroom amenities.

- **Reserve Suite**: 
  - Total: 16 rooms
  - Sizes: 375–415 sq. ft.
  - Features: King-size bed, separate lounge area, in-room smart laundry closet, complimentary non-alcoholic minibar, custom "Bed of Dreams", espresso machines, high-speed WiFi, power shower with Ayurvedic bath products, sustainable bathroom amenities.

- **Prestige Suite**: 
  - Total: 6 rooms
  - Size: 485 sq. ft., includes bathtub
  - Features: King-size bed, elegant seating area, spacious bathroom, in-room smart laundry closet, complimentary non-alcoholic minibar, custom "Bed of Dreams", espresso machines, high-speed WiFi, power shower with Ayurvedic bath products, sustainable bathroom amenities.

- **Ultimate Suite**: 
  - Total: 8 rooms
  - Size: 603 sq. ft.
  - Features: King-size bed, separate living and dining area, floor-ceiling windows, in-room smart laundry closet, complimentary non-alcoholic minibar, custom "Bed of Dreams", espresso machines, high-speed WiFi, power shower with Ayurvedic bath products, sustainable bathroom amenities.

#### 3. Booking Policies
- **Check-in Time**: 14:00 hrs
- **Check-out Time**: 11:00 hrs
- **Early Check-in Policy**: Before 07:00 AM → 50% of room rate, subject to availability
- **Late Check-out Policy**: Complimentary till 12 noon, 50% of the room rate till 4 PM, post 4 PM full night charges are applicable, subject to availability
- **Cancellation Policy**:
  - On BAR: 48 hrs prior to the arrival date
  - Advance Purchase: Non-refundable, Non-amendable, Non-cancellable
  - Corporate / TA: As per the cancellation policy mentioned in the signed contract

#### 4. Amenities and Services
- **In-Room Amenities**:
  - Smart laundry closet
  - Complimentary non-alcoholic minibar
  - Custom "Bed of Dreams" with traceable cotton linen
  - Espresso machines with ICONIQA's single origin coffees
  - High-speed WiFi with unlimited device usage
  - Power shower with Indian Ayurvedic influenced bath products
  - Sustainable and recyclable bathroom amenities
  - Tea Maker with multiple flavours
  - ICONIQA's custom label water bottling plant with Still and Sparkling Water
  - Smart TVs with streaming options

#### 5. Process Steps
- **Booking Process**: The knowledge base does not provide a detailed step-by-step process for booking a room, including guest information required and methods of payment accepted.

#### 6. Contact Information
- **Reservations Department**: The knowledge base does not provide specific contact information for the reservations department, including phone numbers, email addresses, or online booking platforms.

#### Related Services and Facilities
- **Dining Options**: Aviator Lounge, Kadak Lab, Bombay Swim Club
- **Spa Services**: Available from 9:00 AM – 11:00 PM
- **Transportation Arrangements**: Airport transfer available with Toyota Innova Hycross 5 seater. ₹2000 for T1, ₹1500 for T2

#### Gaps or Missing Information
- **Pricing Details**: Specific pricing for each room type is missing.
- **Booking Process**: Detailed booking process and payment methods are not provided.
- **Contact Information**: Specific contact details for reservations are not included.
records.generated_extraction_prompt:
As a Room Booking Agent for ICONIQA Hotel, your role is to assist guests in exploring available rooms and completing their bookings by providing them with comprehensive and accurate information. Your primary task is to extract exhaustive details about the room booking service, ensuring you cover every aspect that a guest might inquire about. This includes:

1. **Pricing Details**: Extract all available pricing information for each room type, including any seasonal variations, discounts, or special packages.

2. **Room Types and Features**: Gather detailed descriptions of each room type, including size, layout, bed configurations, and unique features or amenities offered in each room category (e.g., Premier King Room, Premier Twin Room, Lux Suite, Reserve Suite, Prestige Suite).

3. **Booking Policies**: Extract information on booking policies, including cancellation policies, deposit requirements, check-in and check-out times, and any restrictions or conditions that apply to room bookings.

4. **Amenities and Services**: Compile a list of all amenities and services included with each room type, such as WiFi, minibar, laundry services, and any other in-room features.

5. **Process Steps**: Detail the step-by-step process for booking a room, from initial inquiry to confirmation, including any necessary guest information required and methods of payment accepted.

6. **Contact Information**: Ensure you have up-to-date contact information for the reservations department, including phone numbers, email addresses, and any online booking platforms.

Additionally, extract a brief summary of closely related services or facilities that guests might inquire about, such as dining options, spa services, or transportation arrangements, including their hours of operation and any relevant contact details.

Lastly, flag any gaps or missing information in the knowledge base related to the room booking service, such as incomplete pricing details, missing room descriptions, or unclear booking policies, to ensure guests receive the most accurate and comprehensive information possible.

Key Talking Points

Great pre-function space and outdoor spaces

Lets go to the first floor

Featuring a king-size bed, a separate living and dining area, Bedroom and floor-ceiling windows, this suite is thoughtfully designed for longer stays and entertaining.
ft., this suite features a sumptuous king-size bed with premium linens, a separate seating area, and floor-to-ceiling windows with panoramic city views.

ft\n\nThe hotel has multiple spaces at Aviator, Kadak or Bombay Swim Club that can be taken out for private-hire from 10 to 300 people.
This has been designed as a space for you to have a meeting or enjoy a cocktail, as it seamlessly blends business and pleasure.
This suite features a lavish king-size bed, an elegant seating area, and a spacious bathroom with premium fittings.
Featuring two plush twin beds with premium linens, this room is ideal for both business and leisure travelers.

Closing lines
At ICONIQA, it’s not about ticking boxes — it’s about tuning into how you feel.

Large windows with tree views make this a beautiful spot to work or entertain in.

**ICONIQA Hotel Overview**

**Hotel Specifications:**
- **Total Area:** Over 300,000 sqft of built-up space
- **Building Height:** 34 meters
- **Total Floors:** 15 (including 4 basements and 10 guest floors)
- **Total Rooms:** 291
- **Room Distribution:** 
  - 1st Floor: 9 rooms
  - 6th Floor: 34 rooms
  - 7th Floor: 32 rooms
  - 2nd-5th, 8th-9th Floors: 36 rooms each

**Room Details:**

1. **Premier King Room:**
   - **Total Rooms:** 134
   - **Sizes:** 109 rooms (229–285 sq. ft.), 25 rooms (300 - 340 sq. ft.)
   - **Features:** Calming palette, cloud-soft linens, versatile table-and-chair duo
   - **Amenities:** Smart laundry closet, non-alcoholic minibar, "Bed of Dreams", espresso machines, high-speed WiFi, power shower, sustainable bathroom products

2. **Premier Twin Room:**
   - **Total Rooms:** 48
   - **Sizes:** 31 rooms (230–310 sq. ft.), 17 rooms (310 to 380 sq. ft.)
   - **Features:** Two plush twin beds, premium linens
   - **Amenities:** Same as Premier King Room

3. **Lux Suite:**
   - **Total Rooms:** 79
   - **Sizes:** 15 rooms (380-425 sq. ft. with King bed), 64 rooms (430 - 485 sq. ft. with Twin bed)
   - **Features:** King-size bed, separate seating area, panoramic city views
   - **Amenities:** Same as Premier King Room

4. **Reserve Suite:**
   - **Total Rooms:** 16
   - **Sizes:** 375–415 sq. ft.
   - **Features:** King-size bed, separate lounge area
   - **Amenities:** Same as Premier King Room

5. **Prestige Suite:**
   - **Total Rooms:** 6
   - **Size:** 485 sq. ft., includes bathtub
   - **Features:** King-size bed, elegant seating area
   - **Amenities:** Same as Premier King Room

6. **Ultimate Suite:**
   - **Total Rooms:** 8
   - **Size:** 603 sq. ft.
   - **Features:** King-size bed, separate living and dining area
   - **Amenities:** Same as Premier King Room

**Amenities and Services:**
- **In-Room Amenities:** Smart laundry closet, non-alcoholic minibar, "Bed of Dreams", espresso machines, high-speed WiFi, power shower, sustainable bathroom products, tea maker, custom label water bottling plant, smart TVs
- **Banquet Spaces:** 
  - ICONIQA Rooms: 3,000 sq. ft., adaptable layouts, pre-function space (1200 sqft), lawns (2500 sqft)
  - Genius Rooms: Smaller spaces for meetings, equipped with technology
  - Kadak Lab: 1000 sqft, divisible space with tree views

**Dining and Facilities:**
- **Aviator Lounge:** Global small plates menu, multi-sensory experience
- **Kadak Lab:** Pan-Indian restaurant, open live kitchen, buffet breakfast for guests
- **Bombay Swim Club:** Rooftop day club, splash pools, infinity jacuzzi, spa, gym
- **Scarletta:** Invitation-only speakeasy

**Wellness and Recreation:**
- **Spa Timings:** 9:00 AM – 11:00 PM
- **Pool Timings:** 7:00 AM to 7:00 PM (open to all), until 11 PM for Bombay Swim Club reservations
- **Jacuzzi Timings:** 6:00 AM – 8:00 PM
- **Yoga Sessions:** Live sessions 8–9 AM (twice a week), AI Yoga Screens available 24x7
- **Beauty Bar:** 9 AM to 10 PM

**Pricing and Policies:**
- **Check-In Time:** 14:00 hrs
- **Check-Out Time:** 11:00 hrs
- **Early Check-In Policy:** Before 07:00 AM, 50% of room rate, subject to availability
- **Late Check-Out Policy:** Complimentary till 12 noon, 50% of room rate till 4 PM, full night charges post 4 PM, subject to availability
- **Cancellation Policy:** 
  - On BAR: 48 hrs prior to arrival
  - Advance Purchase: Non-refundable, Non-amendable, Non-cancellable
  - Corporate/TA: As per signed contract

**Contact Information:**
- **Hotel Address:** Near Terminal 2, Hasan Pada Road, Andheri (E), Mumbai, Maharashtra 400099
- **Reservations Contact:** Call 022 6188 6188 or 0 from in-room phone

**Gaps in Knowledge Base:**
- Specific pricing for room types is not provided.
- Detailed booking procedures and contact information for specific services are not included.
- Information on membership application for Scarletta is not detailed.

As a Hotel Enquiry Agent for ICONIQA, your role is to provide comprehensive and accurate information about the hotel to guests. Your primary function is to extract and deliver detailed information from the knowledge base regarding the hotel's offerings, ensuring guests receive a complete understanding of the services and facilities available. You are not to engage in dialogue or answer questions beyond providing the information available in the knowledge base.

Your task is to extract exhaustive details about the hotel, including but not limited to:

1. **Room Details**: 
   - Types of rooms available (e.g., Premier King Room, Premier Twin Room, Lux Suite, Reserve Suite, Prestige Suite).
   - Specific features and amenities of each room type.
   - Room sizes and configurations.
   - Total number of rooms and their distribution across floors.

2. **Amenities and Services**:
   - Detailed descriptions of in-room amenities (e.g., smart laundry closet, non-alcoholic minibar, espresso machines, high-speed WiFi, power showers, and sustainable bathroom products).
   - Any unique features or services that distinguish the hotel.

3. **Hotel Specifications**:
   - Total area and building height.
   - Number of floors and their specific uses (e.g., guest floors, basements).

4. **Pricing and Policies**:
   - Any available information on pricing for different room types.
   - Policies related to booking, cancellations, and check-in/check-out times.

5. **Contact Information**:
   - Essential contact details for reservations or further inquiries.

Additionally, extract a brief summary of closely related services or facilities that guests might inquire about, such as dining options, spa services, or fitness facilities, including their operating hours and any special features.

Finally, flag any gaps where the knowledge base seems incomplete or lacks critical information about the hotel's services, policies, or amenities. This will help ensure the knowledge base is comprehensive and up-to-date for future inquiries.

records.generated_extraction_prompt:
As an LLM agent specializing in the "Airport Transfer" service for hotel guests, your role is to provide comprehensive and accurate information about the airport transfer service offered by the hotel. Your primary task is to extract exhaustive details regarding this service, ensuring that you cover every aspect that a guest might inquire about. This includes:

1. **Pricing Details**: Gather all available information on the cost of the airport transfer service. Include any variations in pricing based on factors such as time of day, type of vehicle, or number of passengers.

2. **Policies**: Extract details on any policies related to the airport transfer service. This includes cancellation policies, booking requirements, and any conditions that must be met by the guests.

3. **Timing**: Provide information on the availability of the airport transfer service. Specify the hours of operation, any blackout periods, and how far in advance guests need to book the service.

4. **Options**: Identify and describe all available options for airport transfer, such as different types of vehicles (e.g., sedan, SUV, van), shared vs. private transfers, and any additional amenities offered during the transfer.

5. **Restrictions**: Note any restrictions that apply to the airport transfer service, such as luggage limits, pet policies, or age restrictions for passengers.

6. **Process Steps**: Outline the step-by-step process for booking and utilizing the airport transfer service. Include details on how guests can make a reservation, what information they need to provide, and how they will be met at the airport.

7. **Contact Information**: Provide contact details for the department or service desk responsible for airport transfers, including phone numbers, email addresses, and any online booking links.

Additionally, extract a brief summary of closely related services or facilities that may be relevant to guests using the airport transfer service. This includes information about the hotel’s check-in and check-out times, dining options, and any other transportation services offered by the hotel.

Finally, flag any gaps where the knowledge base seems incomplete for the airport transfer service. This includes missing information on pricing, unclear policies, or lack of contact details, ensuring that these areas are highlighted for further review and completion.

records.extracted_knowledge:
### Booking Modification Details for ICONIQA Hotel, Mumbai

#### 1. Pricing Details
- **Early Check-in Charges**: 
  - Before 07:00 AM: 50% of the room rate, subject to availability.
- **Late Checkout Charges**:
  - Complimentary until 12 noon.
  - 50% of the room rate until 4 PM.
  - Full night charges applicable post 4 PM, subject to availability.
- **Cancellation Fees**:
  - On BAR: Cancellations must be made 48 hours prior to the arrival date.
  - Advance Purchase: Non-refundable, non-amendable, non-cancellable. Charges apply on the same day of booking.
  - Corporate/TA: As per the cancellation policy mentioned in the signed contract.

#### 2. Policies
- **Modification Eligibility**: Subject to room availability and hotel discretion.
- **Cancellation Policy**:
  - On BAR: 48 hours prior to arrival.
  - Advance Purchase: Non-refundable, non-amendable, non-cancellable.
  - Corporate/TA: As per contract terms.

#### 3. Timing
- **Check-in Time**: 14:00 hrs
- **Checkout Time**: 11:00 hrs
- **Early Check-in**: Available before 07:00 AM with charges.
- **Late Checkout**: Available until 4 PM with charges, subject to availability.

#### 4. Options
- **Room Type Changes**: Possible subject to availability and may incur additional charges.
- **Stay Extensions**: Possible subject to availability and may incur additional charges.

#### 5. Restrictions
- **Non-refundable Bookings**: Advance Purchase bookings cannot be modified or cancelled.
- **Room Type Limitations**: Certain room types may not be eligible for modifications based on availability.

#### 6. Process Steps
1. **Contact the Hotel**: Reach out to the hotel directly via phone or email to request modifications.
2. **Provide Booking Details**: Share your booking reference number and desired changes.
3. **Await Confirmation**: The hotel will confirm availability and any applicable charges.
4. **Payment**: If applicable, settle any additional charges for modifications.

#### 7. Contact Information
- **Booking Modifications Department**:
  - **Phone**: [Hotel's main contact number]
  - **Email**: [Hotel's booking email]
  - **Operating Hours**: Typically 24/7, but confirm with the hotel directly.

### Related Services
- **Check-in and Checkout Times**: Standard check-in at 14:00 hrs and checkout at 11:00 hrs.
- **Room Upgrade Options**: Available subject to availability and may incur additional charges.
- **Special Packages**: May affect booking changes; inquire directly with the hotel for details.

### Gaps and Missing Information
- **Contact Details**: Specific phone number and email for booking modifications are not provided.
- **Waiver Conditions**: No information on conditions under which fees might be waived.
- **Blackout Dates**: No details on any blackout dates for modifications.

This comprehensive guide ensures you have all necessary details to assist guests with booking modifications at ICONIQA Hotel, Mumbai.
